design_philosophy.core_goal: Reduce daily friction and prevent forgetting, avoiding cognitive overload.
adhd_friendly_principles: Reduce cognitive load: show only what is needed right now.
Clear visual hierarchy: Top 3 priorities must be massive and isolated.
Predictable structure: consistent navigation and interaction patterns.
Support memory: 'Don't Forget' admin panel with clear warnings.
No unnecessary distractions: No autoplay, no animated backgrounds, no decorative gradients.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Lots of whitespace to calm the mind.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Simplified Control Room Grid (1-3 columns max). Do not clutter.

cards.style: Flat, 1px solid border (border-border), no drop shadows, large padding (p-6).
cards.hover_state: Slight border color darken, no translation/lift to keep it calm.

buttons.primary: Solid primary background, high contrast text, minimal rounded corners (rounded-md).
buttons.secondary: Ghost or subtle outline. Only use one primary button per view.

status_badges.style: Soft pastel background with darker text (e.g., bg-red-100 text-red-800 for urgent). Must be clear and semantic.

navigation.style: Minimal sidebar or top nav with clear labels. Do not hide behind hamburger menus on desktop.

login_bg.description: Minimalist soft abstract gradient background, calming warm light gray. Use for login/auth screen background.

workspace_placeholder_1.description: Clean bright minimalist studio workspace. Can be used as empty state or placeholder.

workspace_placeholder_2.description: Clean bright minimalist desk. Can be used as empty state or placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive components (Dialogs, Select, Dropdowns), but heavily customize to remove default Vercel-look. Strip shadows and make it flat.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Prioritize the Top 3 Tasks in the Dashboard. They should dominate the visual hierarchy.
Do NOT build complex sub-menus or nested pages. Keep the navigation shallow.
Use Lucide-React for clean, minimal icons.
Ensure the Light/Dark mode toggle works smoothly and defaults to system preference or Light mode.
All external links (Canva, Drive, etc.) should use simple anchor tags with target='_blank' and an external link icon.
